zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth von Tecklenburg於1222年出生在德國時，她的父親Otto Count von Tecklenburg37歲，母親Mechthild von Holstein de holland32歲。她和Graf Heinrich III von Oldenburg至少有1個女兒。她去世於1268年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth von Tecklenburg于1222年出生在德国时，她的父亲Otto Count von Tecklenburg37岁，母亲Mechthild von Holstein de holland32岁。她和Graf Heinrich III von Oldenburg至少有1个女儿。她去世于1268年之后。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Tecklenburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from a place so called in North Rhine-Westphalia.

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth von Tecklenburg was born in 1222, in Germany, her father, Otto Count von Tecklenburg, was 37 and her mother, Mechthild von Holstein de holland, was 32. She had at least 1 daughter with Graf Heinrich III von Oldenburg. She died after 1268.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth von Tecklenburg est née en 1222, à Allemagne, son père, Otto Count von Tecklenburg, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Mechthild von Holstein de holland, avait 32 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Graf Heinrich III von Oldenburg. Elle est décédée après 1268.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth von Tecklenburg 1222 in Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Otto Count von Tecklenburg 37 und ihre Mutter Mechthild von Holstein de holland 32. Sie hatte mit Graf Heinrich III von Oldenburg mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1268.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth von Tecklenburg è nata il nel 1222 nel Germania, sua padre, Otto Count von Tecklenburg, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Mechthild von Holstein de holland, aveva 32 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Graf Heinrich III von Oldenburg. Morì dopo il 1268.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth von Tecklenburgが1222年にドイツで生まれた時，父Otto Count von Tecklenburgは37歳，母Mechthild von Holstein de hollandは32歳であった。彼女はGraf Heinrich III von Oldenburgとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1268年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth von Tecklenburg(이)가 1222년 독일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Otto Count von Tecklenburg(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mechthild von Holstein de holland(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 Graf Heinrich III von Oldenburg(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1268년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth von Tecklenburg nasceu em 1222, em Alemanha, seu pai, Otto Count von Tecklenburg, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Mechthild von Holstein de holland, tinha 32 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Graf Heinrich III von Oldenburg. Ela faleceu após 1268.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth von Tecklenburg родилась в 1222 г. в местности Германия, её отцу по имени Otto Count von Tecklenburg было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Mechthild von Holstein de holland, 32. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Graf Heinrich III von Oldenburg. Она умерла после 1268 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth von Tecklenburg nació en 1222, en Alemania, su papá, Otto Count von Tecklenburg, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Mechthild von Holstein de holland, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Graf Heinrich III von Oldenburg. Murió después de 1268.
